name: Free QR Code Generator
description: Generate beautiful custom QR codes instantly for free. Choose from 6 styles, customize colors, and download as PNG. No login, no signup, no limits.

mainEntity.name: Is this QR code generator free?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, our QR code generator is completely free to use. No hidden fees, no signup required, and no limits on how many QR codes you can generate.

mainEntity.name: Do I need to create an account to generate QR codes?

acceptedAnswer.text: No, you don't need to create an account or login. Simply enter your URL or text, customize your QR code, and download it instantly.

mainEntity.name: What formats can I download the QR code in?

acceptedAnswer.text: You can download your QR code as a high-quality PNG image file, which is compatible with all devices and platforms.

mainEntity.name: Can I customize the colors of my QR code?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, you can choose any custom color for both the foreground and background of your QR code. We also provide preset color palettes for quick selection.
